parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

This is a {{ $json.tone }} reminder that invoice #{{ $json.invoice_number }} for ${{ $json.amount }} is now {{ $json.daysPastDue }} days past due.

Please process payment at your earliest convenience.

Payment link: {{ $json.payment_link }}

Thank you,
Billing Team
